query:
-- Verificar respostas do projeto 90004 para o CNAE 4639-7/01
SELECT id, cnae_code, level, round_index, question_text, answer_value 
FROM questionnaire_answers_v3 
WHERE project_id = 90004 AND cnae_code = '4639-7/01'
LIMIT 20;
